vibe: Command-center focus, objective, rigid, functional. A Bloomberg Terminal for crypto intelligence.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: The Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 or gap-6). Dense, utilitarian.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align dense content and tables. Right-align numbers.
spacing_and_layout.surface_style: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. border-collapse, border-r border-b border-border/40.

components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). No shadows. On hover: border color darkens or brightens to primary.
components.tables: Dense rows, sticky headers, monospaced numbers (IBM Plex Mono). High contrast hover states (hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white).
components.buttons: Sharp edges. Primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white hover:bg-[#005bb5]. AI Action: Use 'Tracing Beam' border effect or neon glow.
components.search: Command palette style, large input, stark border, keyboard shortcut hints (CMD+K).

specific_views.dashboard_layout: Sidebar navigation + Top Command Bar + Grid of Widgets.
specific_views.ai_analysis_panel: Use a subtle '#00F0FF/10' background tint with 'Tracing Beam' border. Prefix text with AI icon. Claude-generated text in clear, readable sans-serif (Outfit).
specific_views.transactions_feed: Scrolling or paginated list. Positive values in Green, negative in Red. Monospace fonts for hashes.
specific_views.token_analytics: Bento style mini-charts (using Recharts). Line charts for trends. No fill, just crisp 2px stroke lines.

image_urls.description: Tactical grid background, obsidian black, minimalist intelligence command center aesthetic
Minimalist high-tech AI glowing core icon, cyan and obsidian

interaction_and_motion.hover_states: Crisp, instantaneous color changes. No mushy easing. 0.1s transitions.
interaction_and_motion.loading: Terminal-style ASCII loaders or pure CSS fast-blinking cursors.
interaction_and_motion.data_updates: Flash green/red on cell update (Bloomberg style).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast on all data points. Never gray-on-gray.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='entity-search-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a robust React dashboard. Use HTML/Tailwind for structural layout and Shadcn for complex interactives (Tables, Select, Dialog).
Do NOT use 'Inter'. Install and use 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Mono' via Google Fonts in index.html or layout wrapper.
Implement 'Grid Borders' look: expose the structural grid between dashboard widgets instead of floating rounded cards.
For the AI Analysis Panel, highlight it visually (use the cyan accent or tracing beam) to separate it from pure data.
Make sure the Arkham API connection status indicator is prominent (Top right or Bottom left).
Remember to add 'data-testid' to all interactive components.
Ensure UI looks dense and data-heavy, suitable for on-chain intelligence workflows.
